title: Buffed Elytra
description: The Elytra now loses durability ONLY when using rockets
body:
# Better Elytra
You always thought the Elytra is too op and needs to get balanced?
Then this Mod isn't for you. 

## Features
- No Durability Losing anymore when Gliding/Flying
- Elytra only takes Damage when using Firerockets
- Firerockets now are a bit slower

## Credits
Credits to the Experimental Snapshot 7 from 1.18, where I took the Idea for this Mod 

## Help
When you know how to fix this or have any Idea for this Mod or just want to help me improve the User Experience, then feel free to help me via Github for example.

https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Buffed-Elytra-Mod/issues
